Review focus:
- correctness
- maintainability
- simplicity
- Vue and Ionic best practices
- state management clarity
- mobile-first usability
- test coverage
- unnecessary complexity

Use the output format defined by the `code-reviewer` agent.

Avoid:
- cosmetic comments
- speculative refactors
- rewrite proposals unless strictly necessary
